correspondingSource.sha256Provenance: Computed in-session on 2026-07-18 by downloading https://github.com/melonDS-emu/melonDS/archive/refs/tags/1.1.tar.gz and running `shasum -a 256` locally. GitHub's auto-generated tag source archives are not release assets, so they carry no published checksum via the GitHub releases API (unlike the per-platform runtime assets below, which do — see each platform entry's sha256Provenance). Re-derive by re-downloading the same URL if this needs independent re-verification; the tag is immutable and pinned to sourceCommit above.

darwin-arm64.sha256Provenance: Published by GitHub's release-asset digest API (`gh api repos/melonDS-emu/melonDS/releases/tags/1.1`), independently re-verified in-session by downloading the asset and re-hashing it locally — both matched exactly.
darwin-arm64.note: Universal binary (arm64 + x86_64); shared with darwin-x64.

darwin-x64.sha256Provenance: Published by GitHub's release-asset digest API (`gh api repos/melonDS-emu/melonDS/releases/tags/1.1`), independently re-verified in-session by downloading the asset and re-hashing it locally — both matched exactly.
darwin-x64.note: Universal binary (arm64 + x86_64); shared with darwin-arm64.

win32-x64.sha256Provenance: Published by GitHub's release-asset digest API (`gh api repos/melonDS-emu/melonDS/releases/tags/1.1`), independently re-verified in-session by downloading the asset and re-hashing it locally — both matched exactly.

linux-x64.sha256Provenance: Published by GitHub's release-asset digest API (`gh api repos/melonDS-emu/melonDS/releases/tags/1.1`), independently re-verified in-session by downloading the asset and re-hashing it locally — both matched exactly.
linux-x64.note: Built on Ubuntu; not verified against other glibc-based distros in this wave.
